name: Taming the Mosquito Beast Swarm
description: Wang Lin tames the mosquito beast swarm in Mosquito Valley. The swarm becomes his signature weapon.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Taming the Mosquito Beast Swarm. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
